name: Open C lipped
definition: Folded C-profile with one stiffening lip fold per flange

name: Open C unlipped
definition: Folded plain C-profile with uniform thickness and no lips

name: Z-section
demo_note: Demo code: SNAP-1.0.0 defines ZEE as a superclass with leaves ZLP (lipped) and ZUN (unlipped)

name: Hollow structural section
demo_note: Demo terminal code: SNAP-1.0.0 defines HSS as a superclass with leaves RHS / SHS / CHS

name: Plate / flat
definition: Rectangular solid plate or sheet stock

name: Open C superclass
definition: Any open C-family profile; classifier-only rollup — never a terminal assignment
demo_note: Displayed only when lip condition is unknown (warning W-201)
